_comment: DCA JI tuning system. Derived from harmonic series of C. fqts = 11th partial / octave, aqtf = 13th partial / octave. Multipliers n = 1, 2, 4, 8, 16 (octave doublings). David's working approx: fqts_n = 45*n, aqtf_n = 53.2*n
description: DCA Just Intonation System — harmonic series of C, primary microtonal inflections

C1_partial_10.role: gliss target from fqts in Am

C1_partial_12.role: gliss target from aqtf in Am

relationships: fqts_n8 (359.44) ≈ C1 * 11 (359.7) — same pitch, different derivations
In Am: fqts glisses DOWN to E4 (5th), aqtf glisses DOWN to G4 (min 7th)
In Em: fqts glisses DOWN to B3 (5th), aqtf glisses DOWN to D4 (min 7th)
The gliss from partial 11→10 (fqts→E) and 13→12 (aqtf→G) mirrors Cmaj7 section overtone motion
